description: Core layer — always available. No engine-specific context required.

context.description: Core commands run in any context

required.name: github
required.purpose: GitHub issue/PR management for triage, sync-back, issue reporting

required.name: context7
required.purpose: Library/framework documentation lookup for planning and implementation
required.installCmd: claude mcp add context7 --transport http -- https://mcp.context7.com/mcp

required.name: sequential-thinking
required.purpose: Structured step-by-step analysis for problem-solving when stuck

required.name: memory
required.purpose: Cross-session knowledge persistence via knowledge graph

optional.name: playwright
optional.purpose: Browser automation for E2E testing and visual regression

optional.name: chrome-devtools
optional.purpose: Browser DevTools for console, network, and performance analysis
optional.installCmd: claude mcp add chrome-devtools -- npx -y chrome-devtools-mcp@latest
